intro: Development comes first. Effort is non-negotiable. Respect is required at all times.

items.title: Development Over Winning
items.body: Players learn every position throughout the season. We focus on fundamentals and building athletes who truly understand the game. Progress is what we measure — not the scoreboard.

items.title: Every Player Plays
items.body: Roles are based on development, effort, and attitude — not a fixed depth chart. Playing time evolves as players grow. Everyone earns their reps.

items.title: Coachability
items.body: We ask players to show up ready to learn, take feedback, and compete. Being coachable is a skill — one we develop alongside every other skill on the field.

items.title: Parents as Partners
items.body: Cheer positively. Let us coach. Address concerns privately with staff. No coaching from the stands, no negative reinforcement — ever. We're all on the same team.

items.title: Respect the Game
items.body: Hustle every rep. Shake hands after every game. Wear the uniform right. Treat opponents and umpires with respect. The small stuff matters because it builds the big stuff.
